Loading the libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

Loading the preprocessed dataset
```{r}
df <- read.csv("processed.csv", sep=";", dec=",")
#removing the first column (exported indexing)
df <- df[2:ncol(df)]
```

Nacitanie modelu, zaciatok backward selection
```{r}
#inspo https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tqlWwKv4jg
full_model <- glm(team100_win ~ ., data = df, family = binomial)

best_model <- step(full_model, direction = "backward", trace = FALSE)

summary(best_model)
```
